What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A bearded man wearing a green and blue plaid shirt stands behind a white workbench with a yellow stripe. He gestures with open hands while speaking. Two silver metal bowls sit on a green cutting mat placed on the counter surface. A white pegboard wall covered with hanging tools is in the background. The URL www.youtube.com/romanursu is printed in black text on the front of the workbench.

canonical_answer: At 0s, disassembled parts lie scattered on a wooden table surface; at 2s, a mechanical robot hovers emitting blue electrical sparks; at 6s, white smoke billows around the robot standing on the table; at 10s, a man in a plaid shirt appears behind a white counter; at 14s, the man raises his hands and gestures while speaking.
